cafe.name: The Morning Rush
cafe.description: Regulars at the corner café each ordered a different drink and a different pastry one busy morning. Work out who had what.
clues: Between Ava and Hugo, one goes with Mocha and the other with Muffin.
$13 goes with exactly two of Dane, Macchiato, and Bagel.
The order with the Muffin's price is lower than both Greta and the Chai order.
The Latte order's price is higher than both Hugo and the order with the Muffin.
Greta's price is between the order with the Danish and the Chai order.
Either $17 does not go with Cara or Greta goes with Americano (but not both) if and only if $9 does not go with Mocha.
Either $13 goes with Cara or $15 goes with Danish.
Exactly two of these are true: Greta goes with Croissant; Americano goes with $17; Chai goes with Muffin.
Between Americano and $13, one goes with Cara and the other with Donut.
Dane's price is exactly $6 more than the Cortado order.
Either Hugo goes with $7 or Americano goes with $11.
